name: First Hermits
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons Unsalted Butter (Margarine/Shortening), at Room Temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a bowl, combine flour, spices, and baking soda.
3. Using an electric mixer on medium-low speed, beat butter and sugar until fluffy.
4. Add egg, vanilla extract, and lemon zest; mix until well combined.
5. Beat in half of the flour mixture.
6. Add 1/4 cup milk, then beat in the remaining flour mixture until thoroughly blended.
7. Stir in dates, raisins, and walnuts.
8. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for about 10 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. For the glaze, stir about 4-6 tablespoons of milk into icing sugar to create a thin mixture.
11. Once cookies are baked, spread the glaze over the cooled cookies.
